title: strychnos afzelii
intro: Strychnos afzelii is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as the African strychnine tree or the strychnos tree. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the traditional medicine of West Africa, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos afzelii include its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Strychnos afzelii may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
